summary: Created drop-close skill with SKILL.md and close.py wrapper. Skill provides thin wrapper around N5/lib/close/ with fail-safe guards for Pulse Drop contexts. Verified guard system works correctly (warns on wrong context). Script properly reads drop_id and build_slug from SESSION_STATE and delegates to core.run_drop_close().
learnings: The session state manager initially created worker_id field instead of drop_id field. Core close logic checks for both drop_id and worker_id, with drop_id taking precedence. Guard system successfully prevents misuse of close skills across contexts.
concerns: The core library has TODO markers for actual semantic analysis (summary, learnings, decisions extraction) - these require LLM integration to be implemented.

decisions.decision: Made close.py script executable and followed exact interface from brief
decisions.rationale: Ensures drop closes work exactly as specified in the build plan

decisions.decision: Used thin wrapper pattern around core.run_drop_close()
decisions.rationale: Leverages shared library created by D1.2 rather than duplicating close logic
